description: A new retailer wants to start carrying a wholesaler's products. An agent must set them up as a new customer.

nodes.task_description: Gather the new retailer's business information and credit application.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all the necessary documentation.

nodes.task_description: Run a credit check and establish a credit limit for the new retailer.

expected_outcome.value: The credit check is approved, and a credit limit is set.

nodes.task_description: Create a new customer account in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the new account.

nodes.task_description: Provide the retailer with access to the online ordering portal and send them a welcome packet.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sets up the portal login and sends the welcome information.
